prompt: Create a cinematic widescreen sci-fi game key art scene with black letterbox bars, showing a squadron of exactly 3 futuristic Arwing-style starfighters flying above a deep blue ocean and through bright white clouds under a sunny cyan sky. The largest fighter dominates the center-left foreground in a dynamic side profile, nose pointing left, with angular white fuselage panels, violet-blue swept wings and tail fins, dark glass cockpit canopy with a visible pilot silhouette, small red fox emblem on the cockpit housing, subtle decals including the text STAR FOX, and crisp mechanical panel lines. The second fighter is smaller at the lower center foreground, banking slightly with the same white-and-blue color scheme. The third fighter is mid-right in the background, partially behind the main craft, flying in formation and receding into atmospheric haze. Use a polished 3D-rendered Nintendo-inspired space combat aesthetic, heroic adventure tone, clean hard-surface modeling, glossy materials, realistic sunlight, soft cloud shadows, ocean horizon with tiny distant islands, motion implied by formation spacing, high detail, vibrant colors, sharp focus on the lead ship, 16:9 cinematic composition.
